skill.name: zhihu-search-api-skill
skill.description: This skill helps users automatically extract structured article details and full content from Zhihu via the BrowserAct API. Agent should proactively apply this skill when users express needs like: searching for Zhihu articles on a specific topic, tracking industry trends on Zhihu, monitoring public relations or sentiment on Zhihu, collecting competitor updates, getting the latest reports on specific keywords, monitoring brand exposure in Zhihu media, researching market hot topics, summarizing daily Zhihu industry news, retrieving hot events from the past week, extracting structured data for market research, finding full Zhihu articles for AI agents, extracting full article body from Zhihu links.
skill.summary: Extract structured article details and full content from Zhihu via BrowserAct API
skill.author: browser-act

security_audit.summary: All static findings evaluated as false positives. Network access is limited to BrowserAct API (api.browseract.com) for legitimate data extraction. Environment access is restricted to required API credentials. No prompt injection, no malicious patterns, no exfiltration behavior. The CRITICAL heuristic about dangerous combination is a false alarm - script execution + network access + credential access is standard pattern for API-based extraction tools.

content.user_title: Extract Zhihu articles and trends via BrowserAct
content.value_statement: This skill enables AI agents to automatically extract structured article data and full content from Zhihu using BrowserAct API, eliminating manual browsing and CAPTCHA issues.
actual_capabilities: Search Zhihu articles by keyword with date range filtering
Extract structured data including title, author, publication date, and URL
Retrieve full article body content from search results
Monitor brand or company mentions on Zhihu over specified time periods
Track industry trends and competitor activity on Zhihu platform
limitations: Requires valid BrowserAct API key (BROWSERACT_API_KEY environment variable)
Depends on BrowserAct service availability and rate limits
Cannot bypass premium content paywalls or private articles

use_cases.title: Brand monitoring and PR tracking
use_cases.description: Track how your brand or company is discussed on Zhihu over the past 30 days. Get article titles, engagement metrics, and full content for sentiment analysis.

use_cases.title: Competitor intelligence gathering
use_cases.description: Collect recent product announcements and market activities from competitors on Zhihu. Extract structured data for competitive analysis reports.

use_cases.title: Industry trend research
use_cases.description: Find and analyze the latest discussions on specific topics like AI agents or emerging technologies. Retrieve full articles for detailed content analysis.

prompt_templates.title: Simple article search
prompt_templates.prompt: Search Zhihu for articles about [topic] from the last 7 days

prompt_templates.title: Brand monitoring
prompt_templates.prompt: Monitor [brand_name] mentions on Zhihu over the past 30 days

prompt_templates.title: Competitor analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Find Zhihu articles published by [competitor_name] in the last 90 days and extract the main topics

prompt_templates.title: Deep content extraction
prompt_templates.prompt: Search Zhihu for [keyword], extract up to 20 articles including full body content for a research report on [research_topic]

output_examples.input: Search Zhihu for articles about Claude AI from the last 30 days
output: Found 10 articles on Claude AI from the past month
Top result: 'Claude AI Assistant Deep Dive' by @TechReviewer (2026-04-25)
Summary: Comprehensive review of Claude's capabilities and use cases

output_examples.input: Monitor our brand AcmeCorp on Zhihu for the past week
output: 3 articles mentioning AcmeCorp found from the past 7 days
Most recent: @User123 review posted 2 days ago

best_practices: Always verify BrowserAct API key is configured before running extraction tasks
Use appropriate date ranges (7d, 30d, 90d) to balance freshness and volume
Handle task timeouts gracefully - browser automation tasks may take several minutes
anti_patterns: Do not run extraction without checking if BROWSERACT_API_KEY is set
Avoid requesting excessive article limits that may hit API rate limits
Do not assume extraction will bypass paywalls or private content restrictions

faq.question: What is BrowserAct and why is it needed?
faq.answer: BrowserAct is a browser automation API service that handles CAPTCHA, IP restrictions, and session management. This skill uses BrowserAct to reliably extract Zhihu data without manual intervention.

faq.question: How do I get a BrowserAct API key?
faq.answer: Sign up at browseract.com and obtain your API key from the integrations page. Set it as the BROWSERACT_API_KEY environment variable before using this skill.

faq.question: Can this skill extract paywalled or premium Zhihu content?
faq.answer: No. The skill extracts publicly available content from Zhihu search results. Premium articles behind paywalls cannot be accessed.

faq.question: How long does a typical extraction task take?
faq.answer: Task completion typically takes 1-5 minutes depending on the number of articles requested and BrowserAct server load.

faq.question: What happens if the API key is invalid?
faq.answer: If the API returns 'Invalid authorization', the skill will inform you and stop retrying. You must provide a valid BrowserAct API key.

faq.question: Can I extract articles from multiple keywords in one request?
faq.answer: Run the script separately for each keyword. You can automate multiple runs in sequence if needed.
